content.json:
# Azure Shadow Cost — Hidden Waste

Seven recurring waste classes that Advisor under-reports or misses, priced from Cost Management actuals. Source: Azure Shadow Cost (CSV uploaded as Log Analytics custom table `HiddenWaste_CL`).

content.query:
HiddenWaste_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize MonthlyGBP=sum(monthly_gbp_d) by Category=category_s
| order by MonthlyGBP desc

content.json:
---

_Source: Azure Shadow Cost — `webapp/backend/`. The web app exports this workbook on demand via /api/workbooks/hidden-waste.json._
